case_title: BAYLOCQ, ROGER vs. YORK, LES et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YORK, LES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 4826 MISSION ST [LOWER BASEMENT GARAGE], LEASE FORFEITED
